operating_time.description: The operating time (in hours) for which the reliability of the component is to be calculated.

mu.description: Location parameter (μ) of the Weibull distribution, used in the reliability formula as the shift parameter. Note: although the background states μ=2000, the answer actually uses μ=1000 in the substitution.

beta.description: Shape parameter (β) of the Weibull distribution, used as the exponent in the reliability formula.

sigma.description: Scale parameter (σ) of the Weibull distribution, used as the denominator in the reliability formula. Note: the answer uses σ=2000 as the denominator in the substitution.
